input.initialPrompt: I only want to run the integration tests using dotnet test. How do I filter by the Integration category?

data.reasoningText: The user wants to know how to filter tests by the "Integration" category using `dotnet test`. Let me look at the test files to understand what test framework and category attributes are being used.

data.content:
This is an MSTest project using `[TestCategory("Integration")]`. Run:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "TestCategory=Integration"
```

This uses the VSTest `--filter` expression to match only tests decorated with `[TestCategory("Integration")]`.
